snp5.15:1.1: To one who reveals the past
snp5.15:1.4: who has gone to the beyond of all phenomena,
snp5.15:1.5:
I’ve come with a desire for a question.
I ask the Sakyan about the knowledge
snp5.15:2.1: of one devoid of perception of forms,
snp5.15:2.2: who has abandoned all the body, every body,
snp5.15:2.6: How is he to be led further on?
snp5.15:3.3: The Tathāgata, knowing directly all stations of consciousness,
snp5.15:3.4: knows for one stationed in them
snp5.15:4.1: Knowing directly the origin of nothingness
snp5.15:4.2: to be the fetter of delight,
snp5.15:4.6: the brahman who has lived to fulfillment.
